game_info.title: Ridiculous Fishing - p5.js
game_info.concept:
**Ridiculous Fishing - A Tale of Redemption** Players initiate a fishing attempt by tapping to cast, then tilt their device left and right to steer the lure, avoiding all fish as it descends to reach maximum depth, which can extend to over 500 units. Once the lure hits a fish or reaches its maximum depth, it automatically begins ascending, and players must rapidly tap the screen to fire their equipped weapon, shooting as many fish as possible that appear on screen. Each caught fish converts into cash based on its rarity and size (e.g., a common fish yields 5 coins, a rare one 50), which players use in a shop UI to purchase upgrades like longer fishing lines (increasing max depth by 50 units), faster lures (increasing descent speed by 15%), and more powerful weapons (increasing projectile count by 1 or damage by 20%). Reaching specific cumulative cash milestones (e.g., 1000, 5000, 10000 coins) or catching unique fish species unlocks new fishing locations (continents), each featuring distinct fish populations, increased depth limits, and more challenging fish patterns during descent and ascent. The primary objective is to complete Billy's narrative journey by progressing through all fishing spots, catching all 60+ unique fish species, and fully upgrading all available equipment to maximize catch efficiency and income.

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/gb/app/ridiculous-fishing-a-tale-of-redemption/id601831815

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

A handcrafted game about fishing with guns, chainsaws & toasters. 

Follow Billy as he tries to find redemption from his uncertain past. Chase your destiny on the high seas and embark on a heroic quest for glory and gills.  

* Hours of gameplay across the continents including a never-ending Infinite arcade world. 
* Dozens of unlockables, weapons and items including popular fishing gear like the Most Expensive Hairdryer In The World and A Bowling Ball. 
* Fish that become hats. 
* No IAP - buy the game, play the game. No additional costs, no hidden fees. Even the hats are IAP-free. 
* Fish that become hats. 

Based on Vlambeers popular 2010 original, Ridiculous Fishing was lovingly handcrafted over the course of two years by Vlambeer (Super Crate Box), Zach Gage (TypeShift, Spelltower, Bit Pilot, Unify) and Greg Wohlwend (Threes, Hundreds, Solipskier, Gasketball). 

Winner of the Apple Design Award 2013; Nominated for the 2011 Independent Games Festival Awards; Declared Most Important News Story 2011 by industry magazine Control International; Featured in The New York Times; 

"Ridiculous Fishing is such a complete package that it's an effortless recommendation." ~ Eli Hodapp (TouchArcade) - (5 / 5)

"Every aspect of the game, from the rewarding upgrade system to the unique graphics, displays an intricate craftsmanship we rarely see on the App Store." ~ Chris Reed (Slide2Play) - (4 / 4)

"Vlambeer's game is, as its title suggests, ridiculous. In its simple, gleeful rhythms of play, it's sublime, too." ~ EDGE - (9 / 10)

"One of the most mechanically satisfying experiences you'll ever find, and wrapped in a dazzlingly cool aesthetic." ~ Eli Cymet (Gamezebo) - (5 / 5)

"It makes the mass destruction of innocent sea life absolutely adorable." ~ Andrew Webster (The Verge)

"I've come to think of Ridiculous Fishing as the unofficial game of Wes Anderson's movie The Life Aquatic." ~ Rob Hearn (PocketGamer)

"Ridiculous Fishing is from an alternate iPhone gaming universe where Nintendo is the production quality standard and action is everything." ~ Robert Ashley (A Life Well Wasted)

"A rare pearl amidst the endless sardines of iOS games." ~ Chris Bateman (International Hobo)

"I'm hooked up to an IV and playing Ridiculous Fishing. One is medicine, the other is a painkiller." ~ Ben Kuchera (PA Report)

"Ridiculous Fishing is something very special." ~ exp. Magazine
game_info.description:
Ridiculous Fishing - A Tale of Redemption.
Help Billy find redemption on the high seas. Cast your line into the depths, dodging fish on the way down to reach the abyss. Once you hook a fish or reach your limit, reel them in, collecting as many as possible on the way up. Finally, fling your catch into the air and blast them with your weapon to earn cash. Use your earnings to buy upgrades and reach greater depths!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Steer Hook (Descent/Ascent) / Aim Weapon (Shooting) / Select Upgrade (Shop)
Space: Shoot Weapon (Shooting)
Z: Buy Upgrade (Shop)
Enter: Start Game / Cast Line (Shop) / Continue (Summary)
Esc: Pause / Unpause
R: Restart Game

TEST_1.test_description: Verify basic game loop: Descent, Ascent, Shooting, and Shop transition.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test will initiate a cast. It will intentionally collide with the first fish it sees to trigger ascent immediately. It will then wait for the shooting phase and fire the gun randomly. Finally, it will attempt to buy an upgrade if affordable.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game should transition through 'DESCENT', 'ASCENT', 'SHOOTING', and return to 'SHOP' sub-phase without crashing.

TEST_2.test_description: Attempt a deeper run to test scrolling and fish generation.
TEST_2.strategy_description: During descent, the AI will detect fish below the hook and steer away to maximize depth. During ascent, it will steer towards fish. During shooting, it will aim at the nearest fish.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player should reach a depth greater than 200px and collect some money, verifying the physics and scoring systems.
